description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are a mix of light-colored plaster and stone accents, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. The property is surrounded by a light wooden fence and includes landscaped elements such as trees, shrubs, and a small pond in the yard. The front facade has a covered porch with columns, a paved driveway leading to a carport, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor seating and decorative plants. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, making it suitable for upscale suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a gable roof, stone and plaster exterior, fenced yard, and landscaped garden with a pond and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the gable roof, carport, and side fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pond, and additional windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite front angle showing the porch, driveway, and more of the garden and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
